vocab.simpleZh: 容易记住、让人印象深刻。
vocab.exampleEn: The most memorable lesson I had was the one that changed my study habits.
vocab.exampleZh: 我最难忘的一节课是改变了我学习习惯的那节课。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use memorable for people, places, lessons, events, and experiences.
vocab.upgradeZh: memorable 可形容人、地方、课程、事件和经历。

cycle.summaryEn: Learn useful word partnerships so your English sounds more natural.
cycle.summaryZh: 学习常用搭配，让英语听起来更自然。

frame.useEn: Use to support your point with an example.

meaningEn: This speaking word helps Becky sound clearer and more natural.
meaningZh: 这个口语词可以帮助 Becky 说得更清楚、更自然。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "memorable" using For instance, ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "memorable" 和 例如... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
